title: Votv Paintings
description: Paintings from Voices of the Void wiki images For Sethboiardee Edition Modpack
body:
![Sethboiardee Edition Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e27c1a676bd0d0ad37ca324db39fdb23714c9d22.png)

# Welcome!

This mod was made to compliment a modpack im making for a streamer called Sethboiardee, feel free to use it as you need, but as for what this mod contains it has:

6 2x2 Argemia Plushies
1 1x2 Argemia poster
1 1x2 Kerfer (Pink)
1 4x3 Red sky event
1 4x4 Self portrait

All rights reserved to [Mr.Dr.Nose](https://mrdrnose.itch.io/) and his game [Voices of the Void](https://mrdrnose.itch.io/votv) | I DO NOT OWN ANYTHING, go play the game, its amazing
